title: BEM-840 manual queue cleanup
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_manual_archive','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-23 | 00:00 (UTC+3)'
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
archive=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_manual_archive')
removed=[]
kept=[]
# Manual cleanup: archive every existing queue json, valid or invalid, to remove accumulated stale/bad state.
for p in sorted(queue.glob('*.json')):
    if p.is_file():
        target=archive/(p.name+'.archived.txt')
        target.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore')+sep)
        p.unlink()
        removed.append({'path':str(p),'archived_as':str(target)})
# Create exactly one valid Claude dispatch queue item.
fresh=queue/'bem840_single_valid_claude_dispatch.json'
fresh.write_text(json.dumps({
  'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9',
  'workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml',
  'workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml',
  'ref':'main',
  'inputs':{},
  'reason':'BEM-840 manual cleanup single valid Claude dispatch after bypass channel not proven',
  'created_at':created
},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# Validate queue contains one valid JSON.
valid=True; error=None
try:
    json.loads(fresh.read_text(errors='ignore'))
except Exception as exc:
    valid=False; error=str(exc)
status='manual_queue_cleaned_single_valid_dispatch_created' if valid else 'manual_queue_cleanup_failed'
next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results, Claude runtime, real response'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'removed_count':len(removed),'removed':removed,'fresh_queue_file':str(fresh),'fresh_valid':valid,'fresh_error':error,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_manual_queue_cleanup_and_single_valid_dispatch.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_manual_queue_cleanup_and_single_valid_dispatch.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Manual Queue Cleanup And Single Valid Dispatch | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_manual_queue_cleanup_and_single_valid_dispatch.json','governance/reports/bem840_manual_queue_cleanup_and_single_valid_dispatch.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(fresh)]
for item in removed: changed.append(item['archived_as'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Manually archived all workflow dispatch queue JSON files and created exactly one fresh valid Claude dispatcher queue item because no full bypass channel was proven')
"""
No issue comments.
